CONTENT.Career: Fonn Witry started his career at Rosenborg as a junior. Fonn Witry signed with Ranheim in 2015.Fonn Witry made his debut for Ranheim in Eliteserien in a 4–1 win against Stabæk.On the 20th of December 2018, he signed for Djurgårdens IF in Allsvenskan. He got his debut in the first game of the 2019 season against GIF Sundsvall on 1 April.On 30 August 2022, he signed for Ludogorets Razgrad of the Bulgarian First League.
CONTENT.Honours: Djurgårdens IFAllsvenskan: 2019Ludogorets RazgradBulgarian First League: 2022–23Bulgarian Cup: 2022–23Bulgarian Supercup: 2023

SUMMARY: Aslak Fonn Witry (born 10 March 1996) is a Norwegian footballer who plays as a defender for Bulgarian club Ludogorets Razgrad.
